final_prompt.prompt:
Create a WeChat official account article cover for a fragrance product launch (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a premium/luxury aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition with the title prominently featured
Subject: must include the fragrance product launch context
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an autumn atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn color direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; title must be prominently featured per user spec
Avoid:
